extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters against and by: I counted only the against rows—criminal cases against the Company and Promoters are Nil (0), statutory/regulatory actions against the Company are 7, and taxation cases against the Company are 11; the By Company civil and criminal rows and By Promoters civil row were excluded, and no subsidiary rows are disclosed. For the quantified aggregate against the Company and its subsidiaries, I included ₹18.50 million of statutory/regulatory actions and ₹77.01 million of taxation cases, while excluding the ₹Not quantifiable civil matter, producing ₹95.51 million, or ₹9.551 crore, at ₹10 million per crore. The contingent-liabilities figure is the explicitly stated aggregate total of ₹127.02 million as at June 30, 2020, converted to ₹12.702 crore; the line items were not re-summed. The company-wide top-five customer concentration is 48.86% for Fiscal 2020, measured against total revenue from operations; no company-wide top-ten percentage is disclosed. The source tables use ₹ million, and all crore amounts are converted by dividing million amounts by 10.
